chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D- 2938 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections 2. For katcha Peshi 13.02.2018. Mr. Mushtaque Ali Taggar Advocate for petitioner Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto Asstt:A.G Mr. Lutufullah Arain DAG -=-=- After hearing the Learned counsel for the parties at some considerable length, learned counsel for the petitioner submits that he would be satisfied and shall not press this petition, if petitioner is allowed to file application before the respondent No.6 for redressal of his grievance as stated in prayer clause “C” of the petition and on filing such application, said respondent shall decide the same within a period of two months as per law after hearing the parties. Learned AAG and APG have raised their no objection to the above proposition. In view of above, this petition stands disposed of. However, petitioner is allowed to file application before respondent No.6 in terms of prayer clause “C” of the petition and on filing of such application, the said respondent shall decide the same within a period of two months as per law. JUDGE JUDGE A.Rasheed/steno
